title: Automation: Archive item XX days after status has been marked complete?
excerpt:
Is there an Automation that can archive an item 10 days after the item has been marked as Status Complete? 
Thank you,

posts.author: Gessleman (Patrick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there an Automation that can archive an item 10 days after the item has been marked as Status Complete?

Thank you,

posts.author: MHaigh (Matthew Haigh)
posts.cookedHtml: You can do this, as a 2 step process. Create a “completed date” field, with an automation “When status=complete set CompletedDate=Today” and then a second automation using date passed such as “60 days after CompletedDate then Archive Item”… this works for me.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
